episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 518: Dan-de-dan-dan-dan
episode.description:
Cliff and James pull you into all the hottest Magic the Gathering card price action of the week, including meta updates, cards to watch and how the Dandan Secret Lair deck drop ended up.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
